features: New access system with Partner Edition (password) and SE Edition (GitHub PAT or base64 token).
Dynamic tools hub: deploy tools from private GitHub repos via base64 access tokens with one-click install.
New Admin Panel: token generator with configurable expiry date, bulk tool loader, and active tools management with delete.
Tool cards now display the creator name and expiry status badges.
Cortex Audit: updated compatibility to XDR 5.1 & XSIAM 3.5.
Cortex Audit: NGFW Log Ingestion check rewritten with new XQL query that now also reports Threat, URL, File, and GlobalProtect log delivery.
Cortex Audit: Linux policy matrix corrected — Local File Threat Examination (LTEE) replaces ELF Loading Examination to match the current Cortex XDR UI.
Cortex Audit: XQL error responses now include the HTTP status code for faster diagnosis.
Added the ability to download in PDF format, as well as adding the type of report to download to the file name.
Fix in the API query for unknown datasets.
Bug in PoVRadar. Removed closed state in the forecast.
Bug in ContentImporter. Now we're able to upload Dashboards correctly.
Added OTA Update System with direct GitHub Tarball download.
Fixed Setup Wizard skip button logic.
Redesigned sidebar for all Cortex tools to a compact 260px width.
Introduced GitHub PAT integration for Content Importer.
Added smart logic to handle missing .git folders in Docker.
